mapper.select: SELECT id_student AS id, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE deleted = false
SELECT id_student AS id, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE id_student = #{id}
SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, name, starting_date AS startingDate, assured_finishing_date AS assuredFinishingDate FROM student_courses WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT id_student AS id, name, kana_name AS kanaName, nickname, mail_address AS mailAddress, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted FROM student WHERE id_student = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (name, kana_name, nickname, mail_address, address, age, sex, remark, course, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{kanaName}, #{nickname}, #{mailAddress}, #{address}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark}, #{course}, #{deleted})
INSERT INTO student_courses (student_id, name, starting_date, assured_finishing_date) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{name}, #{startingDate}, #{assuredFinishingDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET name = #{name}, kana_name = #{kanaName}, nickname = #{nickname}, mail_address = #{mailAddress}, address = #{address}, age = #{age}, sex = #{sex}, remark = #{remark}, course = #{course}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE id_student = #{id}
